title: Playmobil City Action 71153 Airport with Airplane and Control Tower, With Environmentally Friendly 2-in-1 Reversible Cardboard Packaging, Plane Toy for 4+ Year Olds
features: Playmobil airport with control tower, check-in desk and security control, Playmobil aeroplane with pilot, passengers and lots more
Toy aeroplane with 360° swivelling wheels and removable roof, Toy airport with monitors, cameras and more

Reversible 2-in-1 shipping box (brown outside and colourful inside) for gift giving - less waste, conservation of natural resources by reducing the volume of the packaging, and 100Percent recycled packaging bag

Toy for children ages 4+, Everyday use: instructions for assembly (with parents), Easy assembly thanks to numbered bags, High quality, robust design, To clean the parts (not including stickers), place pieces under running water containing no chemical agents

Contents: 1x Playmobil City Action Airport with Airplane [Amazon Exclusive], 146-piece figure playset with assembly instructions: 1 Playmobil aeroplane, 1 tower, 1 building, 1 Playmobil pilot, 1 Playmobil airline worker, 6 people, 135 accessories, Material: plastic, Comes in sustainable e-commerce packaging, LxWxH aeroplane: approx. 41 x 44 x 15 cm, airport: approx. 46.5 x 23 x 18.5 cm (without cameras), tower: approx. 24 x 15 x 16 cm (without aerial), Weight: 1659 g, 71153
description: From the manufacturer Road Construction Site Construction Lorry with Crane Big Digger Excavator with shovel Construction Site Promo Pack Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.8 out of 5 stars 1,144 4.8 out of 5 stars 1,144 4.8 out of 5 stars 1,144 4.8 out of 5 stars 1,144 4.8 out of 5 stars 1,144 Price £16.99 £ 16 . 99 £29.99 £ 29 . 99 £40.49 £ 40 . 49 £52.18 £ 52 . 18 £30.21 £ 30 . 21 Description What on earth is going on here on the road? The two construction workers had to cordon off the section of road to compact the new asphalt with the roller. With its extendable and swivelling telescopic arm, the truck can effortlessly manoeuvre all heavy objects back and forth on the construction site. Its large loading area can be tilted up and down and the side sections folded down. Help the construction worker with the cool new PLAYMOBIL excavator with driver's cab, large shovel, a handle for moving the shovel up and down and an extra shovel for the ground work on the construction site. Grab your hard hat and get to work. Every helping hand is needed on the PLAYMOBIL construction site. Help the construction workers erect the steel girder scaffolding and lift heavy loads onto the roof with the crane. Safe and well-equipped, the electronics technician lays the cables - everything for a successful construction project! For children aged 4+ years 4+ years 4+ years 4+ years 4+ years Functions Movable roller With extendable and swivelling telescopic arm, large loading area for tilting up and down and folding down the side sections 360° rotatable superstructure, movable shovel, openable excavator with storage space 360° rotatable superstructure, movable shovel, openable excavator with storage space With movable cable winch and crane
